summary: Workspace inline edit feature fully tested. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend tests pass - pencil icon, edit mode, name/description inputs, Save/Cancel buttons, Enter/Escape keys, empty name validation, success toast, and workspace list sync all working correctly.

backend: PUT /api/workspaces/{id} - update both name and description (200)
GET /api/workspaces/{id} - returns updated data after PUT (persistence verified)
Workspace restored to original state after tests
frontend: Pencil edit button visible in view mode
Click pencil enters edit mode with form
Name input pre-filled with current workspace name
Cancel button exits edit mode without saving
Escape key exits edit mode without saving
Empty name validation - shows error toast, stays in edit mode
Save button calls PUT API and shows success toast
Workspace name updates in main block after save
Workspace name updates in workspace list after save
'Ajouter une description' link appears when no description
Clicking 'Ajouter une description' enters edit mode

backend_endpoint.validation: Empty name rejected (400), only admin can update (403)
backend_endpoint.response: Returns updated workspace with updated_at timestamp

frontend_inline_edit.pencil_icon: Visible in top-right of workspace block
frontend_inline_edit.edit_mode: Name input + description textarea + Save/Cancel buttons
frontend_inline_edit.validation: Empty name shows error toast, prevents save
frontend_inline_edit.success_feedback: Toast 'Workspace mis à jour' on successful save
frontend_inline_edit.state_sync: Both main block and workspace list update after save

add_description_link.behavior: Appears when no description, clicking enters edit mode

seed_data_creation: None - used existing workspace, restored to original state after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workspace inline edit feature fully implemented and tested. Key components: (1) PUT /api/workspaces/{workspace_id} endpoint with name/description update, validation, and admin-only access. (2) WorkspaceSettings.js with inline edit mode, pencil icon, form inputs, keyboard shortcuts (Enter/Escape), and toast notifications. (3) WorkspaceContext.js updateWorkspace method syncs state. (4) Workspace restored to 'Mon Workspace' with empty description after tests.
